svg.title: College Fee Analysis – Collegedunia Scraping and EDA Flow
svg.desc: Flowchart matching the original structure, updated with Collegedunia project specifics: BeautifulSoup scraping, fee data extraction, pandas cleaning, and EDA visualisations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools and libraries were used to set up this project?')
sendPrompt('What was the target on Collegedunia and what data fields were in scope?')
sendPrompt('How was the HTTP request sent to Collegedunia?')
sendPrompt('How was a failed HTTP response handled during scraping?')
sendPrompt('What retry or logging strategy was used for failed requests?')
sendPrompt('How was BeautifulSoup used to parse Collegedunia HTML?')
sendPrompt('What specific fee fields were extracted from Collegedunia?')
sendPrompt('How was pagination handled on Collegedunia?')
sendPrompt('How was the raw scraped fee data stored?')
sendPrompt('What cleaning steps were applied to the college fee dataset?')
sendPrompt('What descriptive statistics were computed for the fee data?')
sendPrompt('What charts and plots were created for the fee analysis EDA?')
sendPrompt('What correlation and outlier analysis was done on fee data?')
sendPrompt('What were the final insights and findings of the college fee analysis?')
